text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To think I'd injure myself... This<n>doesn't bode
well at all, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well... no, the injury itself is nothing<n>serious. The
real problem is... it's a<n>bad sign for the future.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
An injury is a sign of grueling ordeals<n>to come!
This must be what the great<n>Shiraoki is trying to
warn me about!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Just imagining what kind ofdisasters will befall me gives me theshivers...
choice_data_list: Well, let's take it easy for now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Just imagining what kind ofdisasters will befall me gives me theshivers...
choice_data_list: Well, let's take it easy for now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The best thing to do at<n>times like this
is shut yourself awa—I<n>mean, stock up on good
luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In which case, let's sprinkle purifying<n>salt and
sake all the way home for<n>good measure!

I tell her not to overdo it, and she<n>takes some time
to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I definitely cannot show weakness!<n>I'm strong
and I'll be just fine...<n>probably!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I don't have it in me! I'm not<n>strong
enough to do this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I must be dripping with bad energy by<n>now!

All this commotion only negatively<n>impacts her
injury, and as a result,<n>she has to take a few
days off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Though only barely, it'sseems I've bested my ownweakness.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll get to resting up and healing my<n>injuries! That
should ward off any<n>bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now all I need is a lucky charm to<n>help speed up
my recovery!

Matikanefukukitaru is burning with<n>determination
for our next training<n>session and concentrates all
her<n>energy toward recovery!
